facebook.caption:
POV: you took a wrong turn on D. Đông - Cửa Cạn and found a 4.9-star coffee shop nobody talks about.

Seana Coffee & More sits out near Gành Gió, far from the resort strip. 63 reviews. 4.9 stars. That ratio is rare.

Come for the coffee. Stay because you forgot you were supposed to be somewhere else.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Driving past rice fields and fishing villages on D. Đông - Cửa Cạn. Then this appears. Seana Coffee & More. 4.9 stars. 63 reviews. Pull over.
